interpretation: content-derived: The date written within the meeting notes text file. No specific time was recorded.

event: Filesystem modification time of the supplied files
interpretation: filesystem-derived: The modification timestamp of the files as recorded by the filesystem metadata. Copying/exporting may have altered this metadata.
examiner-generated: The date the evidence was received.
examiner-generated: The date and time the evidence was hashed and examined, which updated the filesystem access timestamps.
